eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Bernalillo, NM; at 3:17 PM on MAR 27, 2019 Effective until 3:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A WEEKLY TEST, IF THIS WAS A REAL EMERGENCY YOU WOULD BE GIVEN ADDITIONAL INFORMATION.  THIS IS A TEST
